_comment: S5-DIAG40 — diagnostic run for D-009 R6 nhard/sync data collection (40 trials). NOT a gate run. Seeds identical to s5-noise-wide.json (same formula), so trials 0–39 are a prefix of the wide scenario. Run to collect ≥30 FP nhard/sync pairs from shim 20260028 NHARD_DIAG build. Result dir: qa/rr-study/results/diag-nhard-2026-06-20/.
name: Noise / false-positive rate (diagnostic 40-trial subset)
description: 40-trial subset of S5-WIDE for D-009 R6 nhard/sync diagnostic. Collects FP (nhard, sync) pairs from the NHARD_DIAG build. Not a gate run — no AD3 threshold applies.
harness_note: No FT8 signal is synthesised. Each slot renders 15 s of wideband AWGN seeded by compute_seed('S5', part_index, trial_index). Any decode is a false positive.

parts.note: Wideband AWGN. level_dbfs is statistically inert for pure AWGN — peak-normalisation cancels amplitude.
